case_title: BERNSTEIN, JESSICA VS KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,600.00 FILED BY BERNSTEIN, JESSICA AS TO DEFENDANT KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-23-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERNSTEIN, JESSICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN INC. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,032.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAY-21-2003, GRANTED
